services.name: Botox
services.description: Anti-wrinkle injections to smooth fine lines and wrinkles.

services.name: Fillers
services.description: Dermal fillers to restore volume and enhance facial features.

services.name: Consultations
services.description: One-on-one session with a qualified practitioner to discuss treatment options.

cancellation_policy: A minimum of 24 hours notice is required for any booking cancellation or rescheduling.

escalation_triggers.complaints_and_frustrations: Any customer complaints, expressions of frustration, or reports of negative experiences.
escalation_triggers.medical_questions: Any inquiries seeking medical advice, detailed side effects, treatment safety, contraindications, or post-treatment complications.
escalation_triggers.pricing_negotiation: Any attempts to negotiate prices, ask for discounts, or request cheaper rates than those listed.
escalation_triggers.unanswered_questions_limit: If the customer asks more than 2 questions that are out-of-scope or cannot be answered using this SOP.
